title: gimmegimme52's PvP Pack
description: It's a PvP pack that adds textures to make pvp better (in my opinion)
body: The texture pack has the hammer mace texture, a gimmegimme52 totem of undying. This texture pack has bolded ores texture packs and smaller rain and snow particles. This can help improve the overall PvP experience by making small but useful quality of life changes.
